steps.description:
Click the "Create" button for the "Large Scale Bot with Azure Durable Functions" sample in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code.
And input ${{var:app_name:large-scale-notification}} into the run time variable.
Click the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" icon in the left sidebar of Visual Studio Code to open the toolkit panel.
Click the green "Launch" button in the Visual Studio Code run/debug panel to start debugging (F5).
Click the "Launch" dropdown button in the RUN AND DEBUG panel of Visual Studio Code to open the list of available launch configurations.
Click the "Launch Remote (Chrome)" option in the run configuration dropdown menu at the top left of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Launch" dropdown in the "RUN AND DEBUG" panel on the left sidebar of Visual Studio Code to select or change the run configuration.
Click inside the "Type a message" input box at the bottom of the Microsoft Teams web interface to focus the text field and prepare for composing a message.
Type "show" into the message input box at the bottom of a Microsoft Teams channel conversation window in the web app.
Press Enter to send the message "show" in the chat input box of the "large-scale-notifidev" channel in Microsoft Teams web interface.
